conventions.depth: per-view depth in DA3 units, shape (N,h,w); multi-view CONSISTENT (one shared frame)
conventions.extrinsics_world2cam: (N,3,4) [R|t], OpenCV world->camera: X_cam = R @ X_world + t
conventions.backproject: X_cam = depth * Kinv @ [u,v,1];  X_world = R^T @ (X_cam - t)
conventions.processed_images: (N,h,w,3) uint8 RGB exactly as fed to DA3 (letterboxed)
